title: callista labuana
intro: Callista labuana, also known as the "beach calistophus," is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Callista labuana include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Callista labuana can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
